entries.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
entries.summary: Full-stack engineer shipping data visualisation for Marchex, a conversation intelligence platform where enterprise marketing and sales teams analyse phone and SMS data. Angular and C#/.NET, millions of call records, sprint delivery with CI/CD.
entries.homeSummary: I ship data visualisation solutions that help enterprise clients turn call and conversation data into actionable insight. Built transcript and charting tools in Angular and C#/.NET so marketing and sales teams can analyse outcomes without a new engineering request every time.
details: Built a call transcript viewer with synced audio so users can review conversations in one place
Shipped self-serve charting on AG Grid so business users can build their own call analytics reports
Delivered 35+ features and 15 bug fixes to production through sprint-based CI/CD
Helped deploy and maintain a backend audio service that delivers structured transcripts to the frontend
Full-stack work on Angular and C#/.NET handling millions of call records for clients including General Motors

entries.title: Software Engineer
entries.summary: Shipped AI chatbot systems in regulated pharma that reduced pressure on call centre reps. Programme credited with over $4M in estimated out-of-hours support savings; built React testing tools adopted team-wide that cut bot validation by more than a day per cycle.
entries.homeSummary: I shipped AI chatbot systems that reduced pressure on call centre reps in regulated pharma. Programme credited with over $4M in estimated out-of-hours support savings; built React testing tools that cut bot validation cycles by more than a day.
details: 95% intent classification accuracy on Azure AI Language Studio (above 92% production threshold)
Chatbot systems credited with over $4M in estimated out-of-hours support savings
Built React UAT platform that cut testing time by more than one full day per cycle
Integrated Cortex LLM gateway for dynamic dialogue in regulated flows
Built Amazon Bedrock drug knowledge agent with AWS Lambda task agents
Runner-up in internal innovation challenge with custom chatbot framework
Earned SAFe Agile Practitioner certification

entries.title: IT Help Adviser
entries.summary: Provided IT support for students and staff, resolving software, login, and network issues and onboarding new users. Documented recurring fixes and ran knowledge-sharing sessions to improve team response times.
entries.homeSummary: I provided IT support for students and staff, resolving software, login, and network issues and onboarding new users quickly. Documented recurring fixes and ran knowledge-sharing sessions to help the team handle common problems faster.
details: Troubleshot network connectivity, software installs, and account access issues
Guided new students through onboarding, email setup, and VPN access
Documented common issues and ran knowledge-sharing sessions for other advisers

entries.title: Intern Computing Teacher
entries.summary: Supported computing lessons across Key Stage 3 and 4.
details: Assisted teachers delivering programming, data representation, and networking topics
One-on-one support during practical coding sessions
UK GDPR and UK Safeguarding Training (TSAT) certifications obtained

entries.title: Contract Game Developer
entries.summary: Remote contract work on a PHP-based game platform.
details: Authored developer documentation for API endpoints, schemas, and auth flows
Built in-game store with real-currency purchases, inventory, and payment API integration
Worked within existing game engine and PHP backend architecture

entries.title: Full-Stack Engineer
entries.summary: Startup full-stack role with short iteration cycles shipping to production.
details: Redesigned application UI from product design feedback with responsive layouts
Built admin dashboard for user activity, engagement metrics, and content management
Shipped features directly to production in a fast-moving startup environment

entries.title: CTO & Software Engineer (Co-founder)
entries.summary: Co-founded Kevvlar, an all-in-one project management SaaS: meetings, live chat, file sharing, and kanban boards on one project board. Access is tied to the project, so adding or removing a member updates every feature at once. ~150 users, live since 2021.
entries.homeSummary: I co-founded Kevvlar, an all-in-one project management SaaS: meetings, live chat, file sharing, and kanban boards on one project board. Access is tied to the project, so adding or removing a member updates every feature at once. ~150 users, live since 2021.
details: Unified workspace per project: meetings, live chat, file sharing, and kanban boards one click away
Project-level permissions: add or remove a member once, access updates across all features
Built the full app from Figma designs and handled roadmap and go-to-market
Grew to ~150 users and 200+ workspaces; launched on Product Hunt
React + Redux frontend, Node/Express + MongoDB + Redis backend
Twilio video, WebSocket live chat, Stripe subscriptions and webhooks
Deployment and monitoring on AWS and Firebase
